name: rojo
description: Enables professional-grade development tools for Roblox developers

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

subcommands.name: build
subcommands.description: Generates a model or place file from the Rojo project

options.description: Where to output the result. Should end in .rbxm, .rbxl, .rbxmx, or .rbxlx

arg.name: OUTPUT
arg.description: Where to output the result. Should end in .rbxm, .rbxl, .rbxmx, or .rbxlx

options.description: Whether to automatically rebuild when any input files change

args.name: PROJECT
args.description: Path to the project to serve. Defaults to the current directory [default: ]

subcommands.name: doc
subcommands.description: Open Rojo's documentation in your browser

subcommands.name: fmt-project
subcommands.description: Reformat a Rojo project using the standard JSON formatting rules

args.name: PROJECT
args.description: Path to the project to format. Defaults to the current directory [default: ]

options.description: The kind of project to create, 'place' or 'model'. Defaults to place

arg.name: KIND
arg.description: The kind of project to create, 'place' or 'model'. Defaults to place

args.name: PATH
args.description: Path to the place to create the project. Defaults to the current directory [default: ]

subcommands.name: serve
subcommands.description: Expose a Rojo project to the Rojo Studio plugin

options.description: The IP address to listen on. Defaults to `127.0.0.1`

arg.name: ADDRESS
arg.description: The IP address to listen on. Defaults to `127.0.0.1`

subcommands.name: sourcemap
subcommands.description: Generates a sourcemap file from the Rojo project

options.description: If non-script files should be included or not. Defaults to false
Where to output the sourcemap. Omit this to use stdout instead of writing to a file. Should end in .json

arg.name: OUTPUT
arg.description: Where to output the sourcemap. Omit this to use stdout instead of writing to a file. Should end in .json

args.name: PROJECT
args.description: Path to the project to use for the sourcemap. Defaults to the current directory [default: ]

subcommands.name: upload
subcommands.description: Builds the project and uploads it to Roblox

options.description: API key obtained from create.roblox.com/credentials. Rojo will use the Open Cloud API when this is provided. Only supports uploading to a place

arg.name: API_KEY
arg.description: API key obtained from create.roblox.com/credentials. Rojo will use the Open Cloud API when this is provided. Only supports uploading to a place

options.description: Authenication cookie to use. If not specified, Rojo will attempt to find one from the system automatically

arg.name: COOKIE
arg.description: Authenication cookie to use. If not specified, Rojo will attempt to find one from the system automatically

options.description: The Universe ID of the given place. Required when using the Open Cloud API

arg.name: UNIVERSE_ID
arg.description: The Universe ID of the given place. Required when using the Open Cloud API

options.description: Set color behavior. Valid values are auto, always, and never [default: auto]
Sets verbosity level. Can be specified multiple times
